steps.description: Create project directory and initialize a virtual environment.
Create main application file 'app.py' with Flask setup and REST endpoints for CRUD operations.
Create a simple in-memory data store for to-do items.
Implement endpoints: GET /todos, POST /todos, GET /todos/<id>, PUT /todos/<id>, DELETE /todos/<id>.
Create a requirements.txt file with dependencies.
Write basic test cases for API endpoints using pytest.
